understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate through a grid-based level, modifying the shape, color, and rotation of a carried piece by stepping on modifier tiles, so that the piece matches the requirements of designated goal cells, and then stepping onto those goal cells to complete them. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be completed to win the game, while managing stamina and lives to avoid a game over.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game operates on a grid with walls, floors, and special tiles. Each move costs 1 stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life and refills stamina. Losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles cycle piece attributes: shape changers cycle through 6 shapes, color changers cycle through 4 colors in a fixed order (orange→blue→green→red→orange), and rotation changers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells require the piece to match specific shape, color, and rotation values simultaneously. Only when all attributes match does stepping on the goal complete it. Completing all goals advances to the next level. Blocked directions must be respected to avoid wasting moves.
